title: Cozy Stir Fry with Jasmine Rice
description: A simple and comforting stir fry dish served with fragrant jasmine rice. Perfect for a cozy night in.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped fermented vegetables and cook until they start to soften.
Add the chopped silky tofu and cook until it's lightly browned.
Add the cozy sauce and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the stir fry over jasmine rice.
Garnish with chopped green onions or sesame seeds, if desired.
